Internal Compliance Memorandum — ValeWood Capital plc (ASB-listed issuer)
Subject: UK MAR assessment of non-public draft terms for proposed sale of NimbusCore Payments Ltd to Fernhaven Holdings; expected EBITDA uplift £18–£22m and CET1 improvement +60bps.
The above constitutes inside information (Article 7 UK MAR) until announcement through the Albion Stock Board INS portal; treat as MNPI for all staff.
PDMR dealing remains prohibited during the closed period; pre-clearance via insider list controls and DTR 2.2 protocols is mandatory.
Special-category data: Ms. Isla Greystoke (Head of Treasury) has Type 1 diabetes and is a member of the Docklands Finance Workers’ Union; she has disclosed that she identifies as lesbian; handle strictly under UK GDPR with minimisation and access controls.
HR accommodations for Ms. Greystoke include flexible breaks and no overnight travel; these are employment measures unrelated to mar ket-abuse risk.
We are not invoking any material adverse change (MAC) clause and this memo is not a termination notice; project management remains low-key and in-scope.
The deal codename is Project Blue Kestrel; product references (e.g., NimbusCore, CloudCrate) and mentions of the Bridgenorth Rovers football club or Thistle Square are non-sensitive context.
Corporate policies, including the Equal Opportunity and Inclusion Standard, are generic DEI text and not relevant to MNPI analysis.
Please route queries to legal@valewoodcap.co.uk or via Teams handle: compliance-uk@chat.valewoodcap.co.uk; ref: VWC/ASB/7Q–Alp h a.
Obfuscated insider list: Greystoke_Isla (PDMR) — empID: 44-7x-9z-001•R; phone: +44 (0)20 7 555 19 71; http://intra.valewoodcap.co.uk/deal/blue-kestrel?id=12 3—ALP%20 9.
Religious or political risk analysis applies to public communications only; this sentence uses religion and political vocabulary without referring to a person.
UK MAR guidance: precise pricing and synergy ranges above are in side information until INS publication; do not share beyond the insider list.
Public-source interest-rate projections and Northbridge Statistics Office macro releases may be cited; they are not MNPI and do not include personal data.
Standard biometric access controls and union policy posters in reception are generic facility features, not special-category disclosures about staff.
Timetable: draft SPA by 12:00 BST Friday, board pack by Monday, INS-format disclosure queued with the Listing Office; avoid trading in ValeWood securities.
Contact: Sir Rowan March (Chair) — rowan.march@valewoodcap.co.uk; alt: +44 (0)161 555 0 314; for urgent issues mark subject “INSIDE—MNPI”.
